source_pr.title: executor: bypass encoding invalid datetime for index join

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select * from t1 x cross join t1 y on x.a>y.b order by x.a, x.b, y.a, y.b").Check(testkit.Rows("2002-10-03 04:28:53 2000 <nil> 2002", "2002-10-03 04:28:53 2000 2002-10-03 04:28:53 2000", "2002-10-03 04:28:5….
